channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bike left in flowerbed and bags rubbish, 14th April
item.description:
Don’t know

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Godstow Road, Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on wall in Cherry Garden park, 14th April
item.description:
There is new graffiti on wall in Cherry Garden park, two lots of graffiti have appeared over the weekend. Please clean it off before move happens - thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 156, Bermondsey Wall East, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping and abandoned bikes, 14th April
item.description:
Someone has left several bags of rubbish, including what appears to be small appliances near the junction box. This has been there for approximately a week. There are also two broken bikes slightly further down the street which have appeared over the last few days.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Howarth Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clearance and replanting, 14th April
item.description:
Could this area be reviewed for clearance and replanting, as it currently appears overgrown and untidy, to improve its appearance?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kirkland Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car has been dumped here for over a year, 14th April
item.description:
Many residents are getting parking tickets because they are unable to use the parking spaces due to dumped cars which have broken windows and never been moved.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barnfield Gardens, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Footway obstruction caused by construction signage, 14th April
item.description:
The attached photograph shows two highway safety concerns on the Lubbock Road footway associated with the AVF Beechbrook House construction site. 1. A temporary construction sign has been placed on the only usable pedestrian footway, narrowing the available walking route. 2. Another temporary sign has been left leaning against private property at the edge of the opposite footway. The legs are not extended, increasing the risk of the sign falling into the pedestrian route. These items obstruct and compromise pedestrian safety, especially for pushchair and wheelchair users who require the full clear width of the pavement. Please investigate this as a highway safety issue, confirm what action will be taken to remove the obstruction and ensure temporary signage is positioned and secured safely, and remind AVF of their obligations in relation to highway safety. Photograph attached - captured 14 April 2026 @ 19:28

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lubbock Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 14 or more vehicles all parked fully on the pavements at alltimes of th day and night making pedestrians walk in the road. They even put their bins out when they leave to reserve their ''' spaces '., 14th April
item.description:
Residents all insist on parking all on the pavements

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Avalon Close, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hire bikes blocking pavement, 14th April
item.description:
Despite there being a designated hire bike parking bay on the road and within 20m this hire company have no regard to stop customers abandoning their bikes in an area which is constantly navigated by blind and partially sighted patients visiting Moorfields Eye Hospital.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11-43, Bath Street, Finsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned fridge and chairs, 14th April
item.description:
Fly tipping near bins

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rectory Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Newbury road street lights too dim, 14th April
item.description:
The street lights at Newbury Road are too dim and we can barely see the sidewalks / pavement because it’s too dark. I live at 25 Newbury road and I did install a sensor light in front of my house as it was too dark before and I felt unsafe.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Newbury Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wheels Park Rules sign is illegible, 14th April
item.description:
The sign on the gate has been vandalised and as a consequence some people are unaware of the wheels park rules

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Church Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 8 bin bags on the street that are open with rubbish pouring out, 14th April
item.description:
Food waste and litter in the street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Jenner Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 14th April
item.description:
This vehicle has been in the same position for months & has not moved at all. It has sustained damage during this time due to where it is parked.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lancaster Road, South Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Japanese Knotweed actively growing, 14th April
item.description:
I am not sure of the ownership of this land but it is the single track adjacent to no 12 Laurel Grove, which leads to the lock-up garages, behind the metal gates. There is knotweed growing on the road/track adjacent to no 12 Laurel Grove SE20, and also knotweed growing behind the gates, though I imagine the area behind the metal gates is privately owned land. Concerned that all of these growth areas will spread to neighbouring properties, which back onto Ivychurch Close, which I believe are managed by Bromley/Clarion.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Laurel Grove, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling, 14th April
item.description:
Constant dog fouling around Alfred fagon apartments that never gets cleaned up
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 265, Rye Lane, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 14th April
item.description:
Dumped rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Craig Park Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa left on floor 4, 14th April
item.description:
Flat 241 on 4th floor was emptied yesterday and this sofa was left outside on the landing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nelson Square, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The low bridge sign is facing the wrong way, 14th April
item.description:
The low bridge sign referring to Tudor Way railway bridge is turned sideways, therefore not visible to HGVs driving down the Queensway towards Tudor Way. It needs to be turned 90 degrees so the oncoming traffic can see it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queensway, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Another bollard come out of ground outside 125B Southborough Lane, 14th April
item.description:
Reported one bollard which the council have placed hoarding around and now a second bollard has been knocked over and is out of the ground and has damaged the pavement. It is both unsightly and a hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southborough Lane, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Play equipment issue, 14th April
item.description:
The roundabout (picture attached) is no longer spinning - it’s completely jammed up.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Restons Crescent, Avery Hill
Report on FixMyStreet
